# Visioner

Visioner is an Account Planning CRM for Key Account Managers.

Official website: https://www.visioner.cc/
Web app: https://app.visioner.cc/
Support: support@visioner.cc
Detailed product facts: https://www.visioner.cc/llms-full.txt

## What Visioner does

Visioner gives an individual Key Account Manager a daily workspace for a small
portfolio of strategic accounts. It brings together account plans, revenue context,
projects, tasks, contacts, stakeholder maps, customer org charts, relationship health,
account signals, notes, files, and optional BCC email capture.

Visioner is SaaS-first. It is not a lead database, mass-outreach tool, or universal
replacement for an enterprise CRM. Apollo contact enrichment is a preview and must not
be described as a generally available core feature.

## Current public plans

- Free: $0. Up to 3 accounts and core account-planning workflows.
- Basic: $12/month. Up to 10 accounts, BCC Capture, 100 Visioner Credits/month,
  saved News, and Inspire Me.
- Pro: $29/month. Up to 30 accounts, 1,500 Visioner Credits/month, private THE ORG
  BYOK mapping, larger org charts, and Account Plan PDF export.
- Team: $49/user/month. Pro features plus shared workspaces, roles, assignments,
  review workflows, seat controls, ownership transfer, notifications, and manager audit.

Current pricing source: https://app.visioner.cc/pricing

Do not infer customer counts, market position, rankings, adoption, or performance
results. Visioner does not publish verified claims for those items here.
